Phase-59.NAME: Matrix Motion and Microinteractions
Phase-59.objective: Add premium motion and microinteraction feedback without harming accessibility or operational speed.
Phase-59.non-goals: WebGL migration, scroll hijacking, long cinematic loaders, backend/runtime changes, deploy/install changes.

steps.step-1: Define motion budget and allowed durations/easings for KrotPN premium interactions.
steps.step-3: Add VPN, MTProto, subscription, alert, and health status transition patterns.
steps.step-4: Add route entrance transitions that preserve fast navigation.
steps.step-6: Verify no pointer interception, scroll hijacking, keyboard trap, or blocked forms.
steps.step-7: Run user/admin builds, motion smoke, regression smokes, XML parse, diff checks, and protected surface guard.

Phase-59.acceptance: Motion feels premium but remains subtle, accessible, and task-focused.

evidence.item: 2026-06-04: frontend and frontend-admin production builds passed.

2026-06-04: scripts/phase59-motion-interactions-smoke.mjs passed with motion budget, microinteraction, status, route, reduced-motion, pointer/scroll/focus, inactive-tab, screenshot static proof, and protected-surface markers.
2026-06-04: Phase-52/55/56/57 regression smokes passed, and post-commit Phase-58 regression smoke passed.
2026-06-04: XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime diff guard passed.
